replies.msg:
首先大家要知道呢份係無約束力議案 (non-binding)，意思係就算通過左都冇法律效力，但一旦通過，我相信會有下面兩個效果 (有錯歡迎指正）

1. 根據慣例同下面第17項指出，呢個動議一旦通過將會出現係VP/HR枱頭 (VP/HR = 歐盟其中一個重要職位，類似歐盟外長)

2. 可以接觸下有份支持呢份議案嘅歐洲議會議員 (MEPs)，探討下一步嘅方向（尤其係歐盟公民）

3. 有時候有啲國家會對於呢類動議作出回應，例如土耳其

大家可以係呢度睇到成份動議
http://www.europarl.europa.eu/doceo/document/RC-9-2019-0013_EN.html
下面有翻譯，譯得好倉猝亦無跟齊外交用語，有錯請大家多多包涵

呢個動議會係今日全體會議時進行。
時間係18號當地時間(Strasbourg) 早上十點開始，議程第一項就係香港。之後講埋美國-墨西哥邊境問題同俄羅斯之後，十一點到一點會投票表決

*要注意，EP投票節奏好快，大家如果睇嘅話要留意下*

香港時間：4pm開始
Live: http://www.europarl.europa.eu/plenary/en/home.html

以下係動議內容：
JOINT MOTION FOR A RESOLUTION
*根據下面兩條規例，佢地五個動議要合埋一齊變joint motion*
pursuant to Rules 144(5) and 132(4) of the Rules of Procedure

所以呢個聯合動議取替左下面呢五個
B9‑0013/2019 (Verts/ALE)
B9‑0015/2019 (ECR)
B9‑0017/2019 (S&D)
B9‑0021/2019 (PPE)
B9‑0023/2019 (Renew)

題目：
On the situation in Hong Kong
(2019/2732(RSP))

下面省略提出決議案嘅MEPs 名

三個修訂有待表決
AMENDMENTS
001-003

European Parliament resolution on the situation in Hong Kong
(2019/2732(RSP))

The European Parliament,

決議案一開始係一堆background info, 所謂嘅 “having regard to” 包括EEAS 出嘅兩份聲明、基本法、中英聯合聲明，聯合國禁止酷刑公約等

兩份EEAS聲明分別係
考慮到6月12號EEAS對於逃犯修訂條例示威出嘅聲明
https://eeas.europa.eu/headquarters/headquarters-homepage/64020/statement-spokesperson-ongoing-protests-against-proposed-extradition-reforms-hong-kong_en

考慮到7月1號EEAS對於香港最近情況出嘅聲明
https://eeas.europa.eu/headquarters/headquarters-homepage/64854/statement-spokesperson-latest-developments-hong-kong_en

A. 鑒於促進同尊重人權，民主，同法治係歐盟與中國關係嘅核心，亦符合歐盟係國際事務一直堅持呢啲價值嘅承諾，及中國亦表示會在其發展及國際合作上肯跟隨呢啲價值

B. 鑒於香港政府提出逃犯修訂條例

C. 鑒於林鄭係 7月9日宣佈這條受到廣泛反對的條例已經「壽終正寢」- “dead”; 鑒於林鄭冇宣佈撤回條例草案

D. 鑒於草案有可能令到有人因政治原因被移交到中國，並面對有人權缺憾的司法制度；鑒於在這個條例修訂之下，香港法庭沒有一個清晰及明確的司法權及法律責任，去審視各項由中國或其他地方的法庭所處理的案件的人權關注

E. 鑒於中國大陸嘅司法系統不獨立於政府及共產黨，而且有非法的禁錮，酷刑，及其他虐待，嚴重違反公平審訊權，「被消失 」及其他沒有經審訊的與外界隔絕的禁錮嘅記錄

F. 鑒於有大量香港市民，由爭取民主的抗爭者到生意佬，都恐懼被送往中國受審

G. 鑒於有前所未有咁多香港人上街，和平地使用其基本集會和抗議的權利；鑒於在 6.12，有成千上萬的示威者喺立法會同附近道路集會，要求政府撤回修訂逃犯條例

H. 鑒於有多過70個人權 NGO, 包括國際特赦組織，香港人權監察，大律師公會， 及香港律師公會，都集體寫信予林鄭，基於條例對人權的威脅，要求政府撤回修訂逃犯條例

I. 鑒於香港警察基於少量示威者嘅暴力行為，而對廣泛和平示威人士使用不必要及過度嘅武力，包括催淚彈、橡膠子彈、布袋（彈），同胡椒噴霧，定性事件為暴動，進行多次拘補；鑒於幾人被控暴動，經定罪最高可判監十年。

J. 鑒於喺過往幾年都見到香港人多次示威，支持民主同全面落實基本法所賦予嘅權利，包括2014年兩傘運動，以及有大型示威支持新聞自由，關注香港人於中國被捕等

K. 鑒於2015 年尾，4名香港居民失蹤，包括桂民海，及一名與巨流傳媒出版社及書店有關的非香港居民；鑒於幾個月後，有消息指幾人被關押於中國大陸的秘密地點；鑒於其中一名書商，回港後，因恐懼被引渡而移居台灣

L. 鑒於基本法訂明條文保障人權及個人自由；鑒於基本法27條保障言論自由，新聞及出版自由，結社、集會、遊行、示威的自由；鑒於基本法45及 48條訂明香港行政長官及立法會全部議員，應最終達至由普選產生嘅目標

M. 鑒於歐盟支持一國兩制方針，及香港高度自治
721 對準政權 五大訴求
但係香港又唔係歐盟成員，咁佢哋可以做d乜？

因此：
1. Calls on the HKSAR Government to withdraw the Fugitive Offenders and Mutual Legal Assistance in Criminal Matters Legislation (Amendment) Bill 2019;
呼籲香港特別行政區政府正式撤回逃犯修訂條例

2. Calls on the HKSAR Government to immediately release and drop all charges against peaceful protesters and all those detained for the peaceful exercise of their freedom of expression during or in the lead-up to protests;
呼籲香港政府立即釋放和平示威者，同埋撤銷所有對和平示威者，及因為在抗議前或抗議其間和平行使緊言論自由而被扣留嘅人嘅控罪

3. Calls for an independent, impartial, effective and prompt investigation into the use of force by Hong Kong police against protesters;
呼籲（政府）儘快就警方對於示威者使用武力嘅情況進行獨立、公正而有效力嘅調查

4. Stresses that the EU shares many of the concerns raised by citizens of Hong Kong regarding the proposed extradition reforms and has conveyed them to the HKSAR Government; underlines that the bill has far-reaching consequences for Hong Kong and its people, for the EU and for foreign citizens, as well as for business confidence in Hong Kong;
強調歐盟同好多香港市民一樣好關注呢個逃犯條例嘅修訂，亦強調呢一個條例修訂對香港同香港人、歐盟及其居於國外既公民，同埋商界對香港既信心有深遠嘅影響

5. Urges Hong Kong to ensure that its legislation remains fully in line with its international human rights obligations, including provisions of the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR) and of the UN Convention against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment;
敦促香港確保佢既法例遵與國際人權法所釐定既義務為一致，包括公民及政治權利國際盟約（ICCPR）以及聯合國禁止酷刑公約（UN Convention against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment）既規定

6. Recognises that the people of Hong Kong have taken to the streets in extraordinary numbers in recent weeks, with estimates of more than a million people on 9 June and up to two million the following week, in mainly peaceful mass demonstrations triggered by high levels of concern regarding the proposed laws on extradition;
承認香港係最近幾個禮拜有令人驚訝數目既市民因為逃犯條例而上街和平示威，包括6月9號近100萬人同一星期後200萬人既遊行

7. Underlines that the rights of Hong Kong citizens have generally been upheld in Hong Kong, but expresses great concern at the steady deterioration of civil rights, political rights and press freedom; is deeply concerned by the unprecedented pressure on journalists and their increasing self-censorship with regard, in particular, to coverage of sensitive issues on mainland China or those concerning the HKSAR Government;
強調香港市民既權利大致上受到保障，但對於持續惡化既公民權利表示關注；深切關注記者承受緊前所未有既壓力，以及佢地係報導涉及大陸同香港政府既敏感話題加劇左自我審查

8. Stresses that the Basic Law guarantees freedom of speech, of the press and publication, and of association, assembly, procession and demonstration; calls on the authorities in Hong Kong and China to ensure the protection of human rights and the freedoms enshrined in the Basic Law for all citizens;
強調基本法保障言論自由、出版及新聞自由、集會、結社同遊行既自由；呼籲香港同中國政府確保所有市民既人權以及基本法列明既各種自由得到保障

9. Strongly condemns the constant and increasing interference by China in Hong Kong’s internal affairs, as well the recent assertion by China that the Sino-British Joint Declaration of 1984 is a historic document, and hence is no longer valid; stresses that the Chinese Government is bound by the Joint Declaration to uphold Hong Kong’s high degree of autonomy and its rights and freedoms;
強烈譴責中國持續且增強對香港內政既干預，以及中國最近關於中英聯合聲明為「歷史文件」，因此「不再具有任何現實意義」既主張；強調中國政府受聯合聲明所限，必須維持香港既高度自治、權利及自由。

10. Notes with deep concern in this context that opposition candidates, including Anges Chow and former lawmaker Lau Siu-Lai, were not allowed to run in the Legislative Council by-election owing to their political affiliation or views;
歐盟深切關注到有反對派嘅候選人係呢一個大環境下唔俾去參與立法會選舉；注意到並深切關注反對派候選人如周庭同前議員劉小麗因其政治立場及觀點，而被禁止參加立法會補選。

replies.msg: 制裁香港？禁止出口裝備俾警察之類掛

11. Calls for the EU, its Member States and the international community to work towards the imposition of appropriate export control mechanisms to deny China, and in particular Hong Kong, access to technologies used to violate basic rights;
呼籲歐盟、其成員國及國際社會去實施適當既出口管制機制去禁止中國，特別係香港，去得到會侵犯基本權利嘅科技。

12. Urges systematic reform to implement direct elections for the position of Chief Executive and to the Legislative Council, as enshrined in the Basic Law, and calls for agreement on an electoral system that is overall democratic, fair, open and transparent and that it grants the people of the HKSAR the right to elect candidates and to stand for election in the selection process for all leadership positions;
敦促香港實行系統性嘅改革，根據基本法，實施行政長官同立法會嘅直接選舉；呼籲各界同意設立一個民主、公平、開放以及透明嘅選舉制度，而該制度該賦予香港市民係所有領導職位投票同參選嘅權利。

13. Repeats its call for the immediate release of book publisher Gui Minhai, a Swedish national;
重申歐盟關於立即釋放瑞典國民桂民海嘅呼籲

14. Underlines the EU’s commitment to strengthening democracy, including the rule of law, the independence of the judiciary, fundamental freedoms and rights, transparency, and freedom of information and expression in Hong Kong;
強調歐盟對於增強民主既承擔，包括香港嘅法治、司法獨立、基本自由及權利、透明度，同資訊流通及言論自由。

15. Recalls the importance of the EU continuing to raise the issue of human rights violations in China at every political and human rights dialogue with the Chinese authorities, in line with the EU’s commitment to project a strong, clear and unified voice in its approach to the country; further recalls that in its ongoing reform process and increasing global engagement, China has opted into the international human rights framework by signing up to a wide range of international human rights treaties; calls for the EU, therefore, to pursue dialogue with China in order to ensure that it lives up to these commitments;
重申歐盟係每一個政治同人權對話中持續對中國政府提起該國侵犯人權既事件及其重要性；依樣嘢符合歐盟一貫對於中國既政策。係中國深化其改革過程並增加參與國際事務嘅時候，透過簽署左一系列嘅國際人權條約，佢被納入左國際人權條約嘅框架裡面。因此，在此呼籲歐盟去繼續與中國進行對話，以確保佢有遵守依啲承諾。

16. Calls on the VP/HR, the EEAS and the Member States to raise all these concerns and to ensure a dialogue with the governments of the HKSAR and of China;
呼籲歐盟外交安全政策高級代表，幫忙對外事務部以及係歐盟成員國共同以上嘅問題表達關注，同時亦呼籲同中國政府同埋香港政府保持對話

17. Instructs its President to forward this resolution to the Council, the Commission, the Vice-President of the Commission / High Representative of the Union for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy, the Government and Parliament of the People’s Republic of China, and the Chief Executive and the Assembly of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region.
指示歐洲議會主席將呢份決議案forward俾歐盟理事會，歐盟委員會，VP/HR (歐盟外交安全政策高級代表），中國政府，中國人大，香港行政長官同立法會

2. Calls on the HKSAR Government to immediately release and drop all charges against peaceful protesters and all those detained for the peaceful exercise of their freedom of expression during or in the lead-up to protests;
呼籲香港政府立即釋放和平示威者，同埋撤銷所有對和平示威者，及因為在抗議前或抗議其間和平行使緊言論自由而被扣留嘅人嘅控罪

4. Stresses that the EU shares many of the concerns raised by citizens of Hong Kong regarding the proposed extradition reforms and has conveyed them to the HKSAR Government; underlines that the bill has far-reaching consequences for Hong Kong and its people, for the EU and for foreign citizens, as well as for business confidence in Hong Kong;
強調歐盟同好多香港市民一樣好關注呢個逃犯條例嘅修訂，亦強調呢一個條例修訂對香港同香港人、歐盟及其居於國外既公民，同埋商界對香港既信心有深遠嘅影響

5. Urges Hong Kong to ensure that its legislation remains fully in line with its international human rights obligations, including provisions of the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR) and of the UN Convention against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment;
敦促香港確保佢既法例遵與國際人權法所釐定既義務為一致，包括公民及政治權利國際盟約（ICCPR）以及聯合國禁止酷刑公約（UN Convention against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment）既規定

6. Recognises that the people of Hong Kong have taken to the streets in extraordinary numbers in recent weeks, with estimates of more than a million people on 9 June and up to two million the following week, in mainly peaceful mass demonstrations triggered by high levels of concern regarding the proposed laws on extradition;
承認香港係最近幾個禮拜有令人驚訝數目既市民因為逃犯條例而上街和平示威，包括6月9號近100萬人同一星期後200萬人既遊行

7. Underlines that the rights of Hong Kong citizens have generally been upheld in Hong Kong, but expresses great concern at the steady deterioration of civil rights, political rights and press freedom; is deeply concerned by the unprecedented pressure on journalists and their increasing self-censorship with regard, in particular, to coverage of sensitive issues on mainland China or those concerning the HKSAR Government;
強調香港市民既權利大致上受到保障，但對於持續惡化既公民權利表示關注；深切關注記者承受緊前所未有既壓力，以及佢地係報導涉及大陸同香港政府既敏感話題加劇左自我審查

8. Stresses that the Basic Law guarantees freedom of speech, of the press and publication, and of association, assembly, procession and demonstration; calls on the authorities in Hong Kong and China to ensure the protection of human rights and the freedoms enshrined in the Basic Law for all citizens;
強調基本法保障言論自由、出版及新聞自由、集會、結社同遊行既自由；呼籲香港同中國政府確保所有市民既人權以及基本法列明既各種自由得到保障

9. Strongly condemns the constant and increasing interference by China in Hong Kong’s internal affairs, as well the recent assertion by China that the Sino-British Joint Declaration of 1984 is a historic document, and hence is no longer valid; stresses that the Chinese Government is bound by the Joint Declaration to uphold Hong Kong’s high degree of autonomy and its rights and freedoms;
強烈譴責中國持續且增強對香港內政既干預，以及中國最近關於中英聯合聲明為「歷史文件」，因此「不再具有任何現實意義」既主張；強調中國政府受聯合聲明所限，必須維持香港既高度自治、權利及自由。

10. Notes with deep concern in this context that opposition candidates, including Anges Chow and former lawmaker Lau Siu-Lai, were not allowed to run in the Legislative Council by-election owing to their political affiliation or views;
歐盟深切關注到有反對派嘅候選人係呢一個大環境下唔俾去參與立法會選舉；注意到並深切關注反對派候選人如周庭同前議員劉小麗因其政治立場及觀點，而被禁止參加立法會補選。

歐洲議會緊急辯論香港情況，議員提出的決議案包含要求特區政府不起訴示威者等。外交部駐香港公署發言人指，有關議案無視事實，混淆是非，自不量力對特區政府依法施政和中央政府對港政策指手畫腳，態度之狂令人咋舌。中方對此予以強烈譴責，表示強烈不滿和堅決反對。

外交部出咗聲啦，話中英聯合聲明已經廢咗，英國對香港冇任何權利。

外交部重申英方在1997年7月1日後對香港沒有權利



快將離任的英國首相文翠珊表示，英國希望與中國有良好的經濟關係，但同時會就《中英聯合聲明》等議題繼續為香港表態，也希望中國繼續遵守《中英聯合聲明》。


在北京，外交部發言人陸慷表示，文翠珊談到《中英聯合聲明》，以主張英國在香港事務上所謂的權利，中方已多次苦口婆心回應，英方在1997年7月1日以後，對香港沒有任何權利，從任何地方也找不到所謂的權利，希望英方醒一醒，重申香港在1997年回歸祖國後，香港事務完全是中國內政，依據中國政府與香港特區政府治理香港，就是依據中國人民共和國憲法和基本法，沒有甚麼其他的東西。

陸慷又表示，堅持中英關係黃金時代是兩國領導人達成的重要共識，如果能很好沿著這個共識共同努力，推進中英關係，肯定符合中英兩國人民的共同利益，但需要英方拿出實際行動，顯示出維護中英關係大局的誠意。

中國外交部駐港公署強烈譴責歐洲議會議員干涉香港事務和中國內政

中新社香港7月18日電 針對媒體報道歐洲議會一些議員近日提出一項涉港議案，其中包含要求特區政府不起訴示威者等內容，中國外交部駐香港特派員公署發言人18日表示，有關議案無視事實，混淆是非，通篇充斥著無知、偏見與虛偽的“雙重標準”，自不量力地對特區政府依法施政和中央政府對港政策指手畫腳、發號施令，無知之深、態度之狂令人咋舌。中方對此予以強烈譴責，表示強烈不滿和堅決反對。

發言人表示，議案對令人發指、事實確鑿的嚴重暴力行為視而不見，對克制執法的香港警察遭受人身攻擊和傷害麻木不仁，毫不掩飾地美化和縱容暴力違法行為，大言不慚地要求特區政府放棄依法追究肇事者責任，完全不顧及香港的整體利益和主流民意。試問這些議員還有沒有一丁點的是非標準？有沒有起碼的道德良知？眼中還有沒有基本的法治觀念？

發言人表示，香港回歸以來，中國政府依照憲法和香港基本法，切實貫徹落實“一國兩制”、“港人治港”、高度自治，香港的法治水平躍居世界前列，香港同胞真正實現了當家作主，依法享有前所未有的民主權利和自由。這是任何不帶偏見的人無法否認的事實。有關議員卻肆意抹黑“一國兩制”和中央政府對港政策，分明是顛倒黑白、別有用心。

發言人強調，香港是中國的香港，香港事務純屬中國內政，不容任何外國、組織或個人以任何方式妄加干涉。我們強烈敦促有關議員認清事實，擺正位置，從維護自身形象和歐方在港利益出發，恪守國際法和國際關係基本準則，尊重中國主權安全，立即停止不負責任的抹黑、信口雌黃的指責和嘩眾取寵的威脅，停止討論和推動有關涉港議案，停止干涉香港事務和中國內政。(完)
